uplink.description: kPa unit: last/min/max/avg absolute pressure in kPa (no conversion)
uplink._note: Upstream P1A example with unit byte=2 (kPa). pressure.absolute is the 'last' reading. Min/max/avg are camelCase extras (vocabulary models a single scalar pressure.absolute).

uplink.description: MPa unit: same floats scaled x1000 to kPa
uplink._note: Upstream P1A example with unit byte=3 (MPa). Converted to kPa from the full-precision float (more accurate than upstream's pre-rounded 22590.3).

uplink.description: Pa unit: same floats scaled /1000 to kPa (synthetic)
uplink._note: Exercises the Pa -> kPa (/1000) conversion path.

uplink.description: Unsupported unit code 0 (C is not a pressure unit) -> error
uplink._note: Unit byte 0 maps to 'C' in the upstream unit table, which is not a pressure unit; we reject rather than emit a bogus pressure.
